summary: Frontend design-revision testing for Thompson Square Medical Centre. Verified all requested design changes: (1) header utility bar renders on desktop with hours/email/address, both over dark hero (white text) AND after scroll (dark text over solid header); (2) hero is centered with badge/heading/subtitle/CTAs/3-item stats strip and NO doctor cutout image; (3) all 4 service cards render with correct icons (medical=Stethoscope, preventive=ShieldCheck, womens=Venus, pediatric=Baby, verified via lucide-* svg class names); (4) About section shows building image + inset family image + '10+ yrs' badge + heading + all 4 value cards; (5) welcome modal regression pass (opens, close X visible, Escape closes); (6) doctor cutout still present in Meet Your Doctor section; (7) Google Map iframe + get-directions-btn present; (8) no broken images (naturalWidth>0 for all). Mobile viewport: utility bar hidden (md:block), mobile menu toggle works, mobile-nav-* + mobile-call-btn present. No 4xx/5xx network responses. Only harmless GET /api/ on mount as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Utility bar text uses white/75 alpha over hero and #4a5d53 after scroll — contrast passes for both states.
Services ICONS map correctly imports Venus + Baby from lucide-react; SERVICE_GROUPS icon keys match the ICONS map (no undefined icons).
About images use loading='lazy' which is fine; both loaded correctly during test.
Hero contains a single background img (heroBg) with aria-hidden — no doctor cutout figure, confirmed via DOM query.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static site with no backend. Design revisions verified: utility bar in header nav (hidden on mobile via md:block), hero has no doctor cutout, Services shows Venus/Baby icons, About has building+family+10+yrs badge composition. All data-testids from problem statement present: hero-badge, hero-call-btn, hero-services-btn, header-call-btn, nav-{about,services,reviews,location}, service-card-{medical,preventive,womens,pediatric}, value-{compassionatecare,familycentred,trustedphysician,walkinwelcome}, welcome-modal, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-nav-*, mobile-call-btn, get-directions-btn. All tests passed both desktop 1920x900 and mobile 390x844.

test_results.about_heading: PASS ('We make healthcare feel like home')
